acceptance_criteria: Output records include source_file and source_row.
Rerunning the fixture does not duplicate output.
failure_scenarios: An invalid row is silently dropped instead of rejected.
negative_cases: Malformed rows are classified as rejected.

cloud_e2e.reason: Cloud verification belongs to goal-auto or explicit environment authority.

local_e2e.reason: Pipeline behaviour must be proven end to end locally.

unit.reason: Parser and key logic are isolated.

success_scenarios: A fixture input row becomes a validated output record with source lineage.

testing_expectations_matrix.behavior_or_risk: Parse fixture rows and preserve lineage
testing_expectations_matrix.cloud_e2e: Not required: build-auto has no cloud authority.
testing_expectations_matrix.local_e2e: Required: fixture source to validated output.
testing_expectations_matrix.unit: Required: parser and lineage key tests.

testing_expectations_matrix.cloud_e2e: Not required: reserved for goal loop.
testing_expectations_matrix.local_e2e: Required: run fixture twice and compare counts.
